payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Edge-cropped dark brown wooden side table with a rectangular top and thick square legs, scuffed/worn finish and visible clutter (books) on the tabletop; partial view shows underside and one leg, likely a low-height table approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
